notes: "Three pretrained GIDD checkpoints (gidd-unif-10b, gidd-mask-3b, gidd-unif-3b) are published on HuggingFace under `dvruette/` and loadable via `AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained`, enabling inference-only evaluation."

data.notes: Three pretrained GIDD checkpoints (gidd-unif-10b, gidd-mask-3b, gidd-unif-3b) are published on HuggingFace under `dvruette/` and loadable via `AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained`, enabling inference-only evaluation.
